ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:3+-2=1 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Gnome — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:16+9=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 26 damage. Gnome — Winged Striker HP: 41/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Gnome — Winged Striker.
--- Gnome — Winged Striker --- HP: 41/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Gnome — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:17+9=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 32 damage. Gnome — Winged Striker HP: 9/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Gnome — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:15+6=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Gnome — Winged Striker HP: -2/67
